title: page_schema
description: Controlled baseline schema for page-level document intelligence outputs. Expanded for governed document-to-page linkage, source and processed artifact lineage, routing traceability, provider substitution, and future modular capability enrichment.

document_id.description: Reference to the logical document this page belongs to.

page_number.description: Sequential page number within the document.

source_bucket.description: Bucket containing the source page artifact or source-derived normalized page artifact.

source_key.description: Object key for the source page artifact or source-derived normalized page artifact.

processed_bucket.description: Bucket containing the processed page artifact after preprocessing.

processed_key.description: Object key for the processed page artifact after preprocessing.

rotation_angle.description: Detected or assigned page rotation angle from preprocessing.

language_code.description: Detected primary language code for the page.

preprocessing_params.description: Preprocessing parameters applied to the page.

line_block_word_confidence.description: Granular OCR confidence structures for lines, blocks, and words.

routing_decision.description: Optional page-level routing traceability, including primary provider, fallback usage, and page-specific decision basis.

evaluation.description: Optional page-level quality, completeness, and benchmark traceability metadata.

metadata.description: Page-level metadata including engine metadata, provider metadata, fraud flags, logos, confidence summaries, and pipeline history extensions.

previous_version_id.description: Reference to prior page version for reprocessing lineage.

multi_layer_text.description: Optional layered text outputs from multiple languages, engines, or providers.

engine_name.description: Engine used for this page output.

engine_version.description: Version of the engine used for this page output.

provider.description: Provider used for this page output, whether internal, open-source, or external API-backed.
